svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="读写分离" id="rwsplit"> <mxGraphModel dx="-514" dy="-141" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="980" pageHeight="540" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="审查与修复读写分离：AI 内部的制衡" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="420" x="280" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="reviewer" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="@code-reviewer
只读 subagent" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="200" x="80" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="reviewerPerm" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#dc2626;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="edit: deny
bash: deny" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="32" width="200" x="80" y="156" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="reviewerJob" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#94a3b8;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="挑问题
🔴必须修 / 🟡建议修 / 🔵提示" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="80" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="main" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dcfce7;strokeColor=#16a34a;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="主会话
可读写" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="200" x="700" y="90" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mainPerm" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#16a34a;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" value="edit: allow
bash: allow" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="32" width="200" x="700" y="156" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mainJob" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#94a3b8;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;" value="改代码
修 🔴🟡 → verify → push 更新 MR" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="700" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="handoff" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#475569;fontSize=11;fontStyle=2;" value="问题清单（单向传递）" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="20" width="220" x="380" y="100" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="earrow" edge="1" parent="1" source="reviewer" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#2563eb;strokeWidth=2;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;endArrow=classic;endFill=1;" target="main"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="verify" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fef3c7;strokeColor=#d97706;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="mvn verify / pnpm test
同一套客观验证" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="200" x="390" y="290" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ever1" edge="1" parent="1" source="mainJob" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#94a3b8;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;dashed=1;" target="verify"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ever2" edge="1" parent="1" source="reviewerJob" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#94a3b8;dashed=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="verify"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="principle" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#1e293b;strokeColor=#1e293b;fontColor=#e2e8f0;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="两个不同角色 = AI 内部的「人与人」制衡
挑刺的不能改码，改码的不能自己判「合格」" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="620" x="180" y="400" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
